title: Talently
rl: average time-to-hire, cut from over a month
overview: Talently is an AI recruiting platform for a fast-scaling company hiring across engineering, design and data. It screens, scores and ranks every applicant by compatibility, so the talent team spends time on people, not spreadsheets.
challenge: With 1,800+ applications a month across 24 open roles, recruiters were buried in manual CV screening. Strong candidates went cold, the pipeline had no real-time visibility, and time-to-hire stretched past a month.
built: AI candidate matching that scores and ranks every applicant by role compatibility
A live hiring pipeline with stage-by-stage funnel and conversion analytics
Interview scheduling with panels, reminders and a weekly calendar view
A searchable talent pool plus offers tracking and recruiting dashboards
quote: Talently surfaces our best-fit candidates the moment they apply. We cut time-to-hire almost in half and stopped losing great people to slow screening.
quoteBy: Head of Talent, scaling tech company
blurb: AI recruiting platform that screens and ranks every applicant.
goal: To design an AI hiring platform that feels effortless to use, replaces manual CV screening with intelligent candidate matching, and gives the talent team clear visibility into every stage of the pipeline.

title: Hovra
rl: rent collection rate across a 300+ unit portfolio
overview: Hovra is a property management platform for Adeyemi Realty Group, a Lagos-based operator running a 312-unit portfolio across five properties — Lekki Heights, Oniru Estate, VI Terrace, Ikoyi Annex and Surulere Close.
challenge: Leasing, maintenance, and rent tracking lived in separate spreadsheets and inboxes. Nothing was real-time, and the team lost hours every week reconciling data by hand and chasing overdue rent.
built: A unified dashboard for units, tenants, leases and occupancy
Rent tracking with payment status, reminders and a collection-rate view
A maintenance request queue with priority, assignment and SLA tracking
Real-time occupancy and monthly revenue reporting by property
quote: We replaced four tools and a mountain of spreadsheets with one platform. Our team got their week back.
blurb: Property management platform for a 300+ unit portfolio.
goal: To replace spreadsheets and disconnected tools with one platform that makes managing units, tenants, rent and maintenance effortless — with real-time visibility across the whole portfolio.

title: Resa
rl: faster response times with an AI-first support flow
overview: Resa is an AI customer-support platform that triages every incoming ticket, drafts high-confidence replies, auto-resolves common issues, and escalates the rest to the right human — across email, live chat and API.
challenge: Response times climbed as ticket volume grew, and hiring couldn't keep pace. Customers waited hours for answers already buried in the docs.
built: An AI agent trained on their docs and past tickets (RAG)
Automatic draft replies for agents to approve
Smart triage and escalation routing
A feedback loop that improves answers over time
quote: It handles the repetitive 80% instantly, so our humans focus on the cases that actually need them.
blurb: AI support agent that drafts, resolves and routes tickets across channels.
goal: To build an autonomous support agent that resolves common tickets end-to-end, escalates the right cases to humans, and gives the team full visibility into every conversation.

title: Solara
rl: increase in free-quote requests after launch
blurb: High-converting landing page for a London solar installer.
goal: To turn solar curiosity into booked surveys — a landing page that makes the savings obvious, builds trust fast, and removes every barrier to requesting a free quote.
overview: Solara Energy is a London solar-panel installer. We designed and built a conversion-focused landing page with a dusk-to-dawn solar aesthetic, a live savings calculator, trust badges, and a frictionless quote form.
challenge: Solar is a high-cost, high-consideration purchase. Visitors needed to grasp the savings, trust the installer, and feel confident requesting a quote — all within the first screen.
built: A savings-calculator hero showing annual savings, CO₂ cut and payback period
Service breakdown — panels, battery storage, EV charging and commercial
A trust layer with MCS / Trustmark badges, 4.9★ reviews and warranties
A short, friendly quote form with grant-eligibility prompts
quote: The new site does the selling for us — people arrive already understanding the savings and book a survey.

title: Tracklo
overview: Tracklo is a logistics operations platform for a London fleet — a real-time control center for vehicles, shipments and deliveries, with a live fleet map, on-time tracking, and driver performance all in one view.
challenge: Dispatch, fleet status, and delivery data were scattered across systems, making it impossible to spot bottlenecks until it was too late.
built: A real-time operations control dashboard
Live fleet and shipment tracking
Automated exception alerts
Performance analytics by route and driver
quote: For the first time we can see the whole operation at a glance — and act before small issues become big ones.
blurb: Real-time control center for fleet, routes and deliveries.
goal: To give operations teams a single real-time control center for fleet, routes and deliveries — replacing manual tracking with live, automated visibility.

title: Finch
blurb: A clean neobank app for balances, cards, bills and spending.
goal: To make everyday money management feel calm and effortless — a fintech app where your balance, payments and spending are always one glance away.
overview: Finch is a consumer fintech app — a clean, dark mobile experience for tracking balances, managing cards, paying bills, sending money and understanding spending at a glance.
challenge: Personal finance apps are cluttered and intimidating. Users needed to see their balance, move money, and understand spending in seconds — without a steep learning curve.
built: A home dashboard with balance, income/expenses and quick actions
Send, request and bill-pay flows in a few taps
Spending analytics with weekly, monthly and yearly views
A clean, dark, accessible mobile design system
quote: It's the first banking app my customers actually enjoy opening.

title: Healthcare Booking Platform
rl: appointment growth within the first quarter
overview: A multi-location clinic relied on phone bookings and a clunky calendar.
challenge: Patients struggled to book outside office hours, no-shows were high, and front-desk staff spent the day on the phone.
built: Online and mobile self-booking
Automated SMS and email reminders
Multi-practitioner scheduling
A simple admin view for the front desk
quote: Bookings tripled and no-shows dropped — patients love booking on their phone at midnight.
blurb: Online booking and scheduling for clinics and patients.
goal: To make booking and managing appointments effortless for both clinics and patients, with automated reminders and clear scheduling visibility.

title: SaaS Analytics Platform
rl: faster customer onboarding after the rebuild
overview: A fintech product's legacy analytics were slow and hard to onboard customers into.
challenge: New customers took days to get value from clunky, slow reports, hurting activation and retention.
built: A rebuilt, fast analytics dashboard
Self-serve onboarding flows
Customizable reports and exports
A scalable data pipeline
quote: Onboarding that took days now takes hours. Activation went up almost immediately.
blurb: Real-time analytics and reporting for product teams.
goal: To turn scattered product data into clear, real-time insight — giving teams self-serve analytics and reporting without engineering bottlenecks.

title: Marketplace for Tradespeople
rl: bookings processed in the first 90 days
overview: A startup wanted to connect homeowners with vetted local tradespeople.
challenge: They needed a trusted two-sided marketplace — discovery, booking, payments, and reviews — launched fast enough to capture demand.
built: Provider profiles, search, and matching
In-app booking and scheduling
Secure payments and payouts
Ratings and reviews for trust
quote: We hit ten thousand bookings in our first quarter — the platform scaled with us from day one.
blurb: Two-sided marketplace matching customers with vetted pros.
goal: To connect customers with vetted tradespeople through a trusted two-sided marketplace that handles discovery, booking and payments end-to-end.

title: Internal Operations CRM
rl: tools replaced by one unified internal system
overview: An SMB ran its entire operation across a dozen disconnected apps.
challenge: Data was duplicated across twelve tools, nothing synced, and onboarding new staff was painful.
built: A custom internal CRM and ops hub
Unified customer and pipeline data
Role-based access and dashboards
Integrations with their existing stack
quote: One system replaced twelve. Everyone finally works from the same source of truth.
blurb: Custom CRM unifying sales, operations and support.
goal: To unify sales, operations and support in one internal CRM that removes duplicate data entry and gives every team a single source of truth.

title: AI Workflow Automation
rl: hours saved every month through automation
overview: An enterprise team spent thousands of hours a month on repetitive manual processes.
challenge: Critical workflows depended on manual data entry and copy-paste between systems — slow, error-prone, and impossible to scale.
built: AI-assisted workflow automations
Automated data sync across systems
Exception handling with human-in-the-loop
Monitoring and audit logging
quote: We gave a thousand hours a month back to the team — and cut errors at the same time.
blurb: Automations that remove manual, repetitive busywork.
goal: To remove manual, repetitive busywork by orchestrating automations across the tools a business already uses — reliably and with full audit visibility.
